en.text: from G0303 (in the sense of reversal) and a derivative of G4632; properly, to pack up (baggage), i.e. (by implication, and figuratively) to upset

senses.gloss_en: from G0303 (in the sense of reversal) and a derivative of G4632; properly, to pack up (baggage), i.e. (by implication, and figuratively) to upset
